---
title: "Protein classification"
description: "Protein classification using a biLSTM neural network"
author:
  - name: Pablo Mas
    url: https://github.com/pablo-mas/protein-classification
    # orcid: 0000-0002-5300-3075
    affiliation: MSc at ESPCI Paris 
date: 05-03-2021
categories: [Python, University, Deep learning, Bioinformatics] # self-defined categories
image: protein-classification.png
draft: false # setting this to `true` will prevent your post from appearing on your listing page until you're ready!
---
